briefdescription.para: Replace the source buffer and clamp the stored view offset to the new content.
Test whether crop indicator characters are shown.

simplesect.para: true if crop indicator characters are shown.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable crop indicator characters.

parameterdescription.para: true to show crop indicator characters.

briefdescription.para: Create a scrolling buffer view for one source buffer.
Calculate the content size for one viewport size.
Measure the content size for one viewport size.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position scrollOffset, Rectangle targetRect, WritableBuffer &buffer, const PaintContext &context) noexcept override
memberdef.name: onPaintArea

briefdescription.para: A surface that renders a scrollable viewport into one readable buffer.
